Untimed Legal Lookup

Find the Source

This is now the standard format for legal review. Read the prompt, use the Kentucky Criminal Law Manual, and type the KRS section/subsection where the answer is found.

Legal Lookup Topics

Examples: 186.010(6), 189.125(3)(a), 503.050, or 508.030.

Separate Legal Scenario Section

Patrol Charge ID

Use the attached Kentucky Patrol Charge Identification scenarios. Choose the single best primary Kentucky charge based only on the stated facts.

Charge Categories

The questions are sorted into the closest matching legal study-guide category. Items that do not fit an existing study guide category are placed in their own category.
